x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Omnichannel routing ensures Now Assist AI can engage customers across all channels (chat, email, portal).
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure omnichannel routing in the CSM Workspace. Enable chat, email, and portal channels. Now Assist CSM AI capabilities extend across all configured omnichannel touchpoints.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca1
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Omnichannel routing ensures Now Assist AI can engage customers across all channels (chat, email, portal).]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSM Omnichannel Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // sys_cs_live_agent_setup records only exist when omnichannel/chat
    // is actively configured — reliable functional evidence
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_live_agent_setup');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active omnichannel live agent setup record(s)';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Omnichannel is configured and active. Now Assist CSM can engage customers across all configured channels with AI-assisted responses.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active omnichannel configuration found. Now Assist CSM AI engagement is limited to portal without omnichannel — customers on chat, email, and messaging channels will not receive AI-assisted responses.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CSM</module><number>CHK0000424</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Configure omnichannel routing in the CSM Workspace. Enable chat, email, and portal channels. Now Assist CSM AI capabilities extend across all configured omnichannel touchpoints.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca1</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSM Omnichannel Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca1</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
